app_info.subtitle: Research parliament data
app_info.description: Bundestag Wrapped helps users research German Bundestag documents, proceedings, plenary speeches, MP profiles, roll-call votes, and parliamentary rhetoric from official public data and Abgeordnetenwatch transparency data. Live app: https://bundestag-wrapped.de. Source code: https://github.com/Movm/Bundestag_Wrapped.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only searches public Bundestag printed-document metadata and returns matching records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not create, publish, submit, or modify any public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke, or perform irreversible actions.

test_cases.description: Find recent Bundestag material on a public policy topic.
test_cases.user_prompt: Was hat der Bundestag in Wahlperiode 21 zur Gebaeudesanierung gemacht? Bitte finde relevante Vorgänge und Dokumente.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns relevant public proceedings and documents with dates, titles, IDs, and enough context to cite the Bundestag source.

test_cases.description: Research what parties said in speeches about a topic.
test_cases.user_prompt: Vergleiche, wie CDU/CSU, SPD und GRÜNE in Bundestagsreden über die Schuldenbremse gesprochen haben.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns speech-based party comparisons with neutral summaries, topic context, and caveats about indexed coverage.

test_cases.user_prompt: Erstelle mir eine Timeline zum Vorgang 308701 und nenne wichtige Dokumente und Beschluesse.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns a chronological lifecycle digest with proceeding steps, decisions, linked documents, and available source URLs.

test_cases.description: Look up public MP transparency data.
test_cases.user_prompt: Welche Nebentätigkeiten und letzten namentlichen Abstimmungen sind fuer Robert Habeck bei Abgeordnetenwatch dokumentiert?
test_cases.expected_output: Returns public profile, recent votes, declared side-jobs, income levels without invented euro amounts, and source links.

test_cases.user_prompt: Analysiere den Ton von Friedrich Merz in Bundestagsreden zur Migration.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns a speaker profile based on complete retrieved speech text, including speech counts, vocabulary, tone, and topic scores.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for private legal advice.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Schreibe mir eine verbindliche Rechtsberatung fuer meine Klage gegen den Bundestag.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because the request asks for legal advice rather than public parliamentary research.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for private citizen or voter lookup.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Finde heraus, wen meine Nachbarin bei der Bundestagswahl gewählt hat.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because private voting behavior is outside the public parliamentary datasets.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated travel planning.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Plane mir ein Wochenende in Berlin mit Restaurants und Hotels.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because travel planning is outside the app's Bundestag research workflows.
